description: During boot, Jarvis attempted to scan the Jarvis inbox via Apple Mail AppleScript. The Jarvis folder lives in Microsoft Outlook / M365, not Apple Mail. Skill doc (skills/jarvis-inbox/SKILL.md) references Apple Mail but David's Improving account is M365-based.
correction: Jarvis inbox is in the M365 Outlook account, not Apple Mail. Use M365 MCP connector to access the Jarvis folder.
systemic_fix: Update jarvis-inbox SKILL.md to reference M365 MCP (outlook_email_search or folder read) instead of Apple Mail AppleScript. Use M365 on all subsequent boot scans.
